changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, vehicle_id BIGINT NOT NULL, seller_id BIGINT NOT NULL, price NUMERIC(15, 2) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(2000), location VARCHAR(255), primary_image_id BIGINT, published_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE listing IS 'Marketplace vehicle listings created by sellers';
